Chang International Circuit, Autódromo Internacional Ayrton Senna (Goiânia), Circuit of the Americas, Losail International Circuit, Circuito de Jerez-Ángel Nieto, Circuit Bugatti (Le Mans), Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, Autodromo Internazionale del Mugello, Balaton Park Circuit, Automotodrom Brno, TT Circuit Assen, Sachsenring, Silverstone Circuit, MotorLand Aragón, Misano World Circuit Marco Simoncelli, Red Bull Ring, Mobility Resort Motegi, Pertamina Mandalika International Circuit, Phillip Island Grand Prix Circuit, Sepang International Circuit, Autódromo Internacional do Algarve, Circuit Ricardo Tormo
